settings.about_heading: We build the tools modern stores run on.
settings.about_paragraph: Tool Haus is a premium studio building high-converting Shopify themes, digital kits, and growth packages for ambitious ecommerce brands.
settings.split_1_heading: Launch-ready digital kits built by experts.
settings.split_1_paragraph: Every kit in our catalog is hand-built, tested, and optimized for real stores. No templates. No filler. Just the tools your store needs to grow.
settings.split_2_heading: Themes and packages, installed and tuned.
settings.split_2_paragraph: From theme installation to conversion tuning, our done-for-you service hands you a store that's ready to sell on day one.
settings.newsletter_subtext: New kits, free resources, and growth guides. One email a month. No spam.
settings.footer_tagline: Everything your store needs to grow.
settings.footer_copyright: © {{ 'now' | date: '%Y' }} Tool Haus. All rights reserved.
